subject: Science
question_text: Which of the following is a physical change?
answer_key: Melting of wax
answer_explanation: Melting of wax only involves a change in state from solid to liquid, no new substance is formed.

subject: Science
question_text: Which of the following is a chemical change?
answer_key: Cooking of vegetables
answer_explanation: Cooking changes the chemical composition of vegetables permanently. Boiling and cutting are physical changes.
provenance_excerpt: Which of the following is a chemical change?

subject: Science
question_text: A chemical change may involve –
options: any or all of the above
answer_key: any or all of the above
answer_explanation: Chemical changes are often accompanied by heat changes, colour changes, evolution of gas, or formation of a precipitate.

subject: Science
question_text:
Which of the following is/are true when milk changes into curd?
(i) Its state is changed from liquid to semi solid.
(ii) It changes colour.
(iii) It changes taste.
(iv) The change cannot be reversed.
Choose the correct option from below:
answer_key: (i), (iii) and (iv) are correct
answer_explanation: Milk does not change its basic white colour when turning into curd, but the state, taste change and the process is irreversible.

subject: Science
question_text:
A man painted his main gate made up of iron, to
(i) prevent it from rusting.
(ii) protect it from sun.
(iii) make it look beautiful.
(iv) make it dust free.
Which of the above statement(s) is/are correct?
answer_key: (i) and (iii)
answer_explanation: Painting creates a barrier between iron and moisture/air to prevent rust, and it also improves aesthetics.

subject: Science
question_text: Iron pillar near the Qutub Minar in Delhi is famous for the following facts. Which of these facts is responsible for its long stability?
options: It is more than 7 metres high.
It was built more than 1600 years ago.
It has not rusted after such a long period.
answer_key: It has not rusted after such a long period.
answer_explanation: Its remarkable rust resistance contributes to its long structural stability over centuries.

subject: Science
question_text: Galvanisation is a process used to prevent the rusting of which of the following?
answer_key: Iron
answer_explanation: Galvanisation is the process of applying a protective zinc coating to iron or steel.
provenance_excerpt: Galvanisation is a process used to prevent the rusting of which of the following?

subject: Science
question_text: Paheli’s mother made a concentrated sugar syrup by dissolving sugar in hot water. On cooling, crystals of sugar got separated. This indicates a –
options: physical change that can be reversed.
chemical change that can be reversed.
physical change that cannot be reversed.
chemical change that cannot be reversed.
answer_key: physical change that can be reversed.
answer_explanation: Crystallization is a physical change because the chemical identity of sugar remains the same, and it can be re-dissolved.

subject: Science
question_text: Which of the following statement is incorrect for a chemical reaction?
options: Heat may be given out but never absorbed.
A colour change may take place.
answer_key: Heat may be given out but never absorbed.
answer_explanation: Reactions can be both exothermic (releasing heat) or endothermic (absorbing heat).

question_text: Two drops of dilute sulphuric acid were added to 1 g of copper sulphate powder and then small amount of hot water was added to dissolve it (step I). On cooling, beautiful blue coloured crystals got separated (step II). Step I and step II are:
answer_key: both physical change.
answer_explanation: Dissolving copper sulphate in water and forming crystals from its saturated solution are both physical changes.

subject: Science
question_text:
State whether the following statements are true or false:
(a) When a candle burns, both physical and chemical changes take place.
(b) Anaerobic bacteria digest animal waste and produce biogas.
(c) Ships suffer a lot of damage though they are painted.
(d) Stretching of rubber band is not a physical change.
answer_key:
(a) True
(b) True
(c) True
(d) False (Stretching a rubber band is a physical change)
answer_explanation: Verifying different types of changes.

subject: Science
question_text:
Explain the following:
(a) Lime water turns milky on passing carbon dioxide gas into it.
(b) Bubbles are produced when acetic acid is added to a solution of sodium hydrogencarbonate.
answer_key:
(a) A chemical reaction occurs forming calcium carbonate, which is an insoluble white solid, causing milkiness.
(b) A chemical reaction produces carbon dioxide gas, which escapes continuously in the form of bubbles (effervescence).
answer_explanation: Explaining observations in chemical reactions.

subject: Science
question_text:
If you leave a piece of iron in the open for a few days, it acquires a film of brownish substance, called rust.
(a) Do you think rust is different from iron?
(b) Can you change rust back into iron by some simple method?
(c) Do you think formation of rust from iron is a chemical change?
(d) Give two other examples of a similar type of change.
answer_key:
(a) Yes, rust (iron oxide) is a different substance from iron.
(b) No, it cannot be reversed by simple physical methods.
(c) Yes, it is a chemical change because a new substance is formed.
(d) Souring of milk, burning of wood.
answer_explanation: In-depth understanding of the rusting process.

subject: Science
question_text:
A student took a solution of copper sulphate in a beaker and put a clean iron nail into it and left it for about an hour.
(a) What changes do you expect?
(b) Are these changes chemical in nature?
(c) Write a word equation for the chemical change, if any.
answer_key:
(a) The blue colour of the solution changes to pale green. A brown deposit of copper forms on the iron nail.
(b) Yes, this is a chemical change.
(c) Copper sulphate + Iron -> Iron sulphate + Copper.
answer_explanation: Observational analysis of the displacement reaction.
